routing_cards.goal_summary: Cancel a pending order for a customer
Process return or exchange for delivered orders
Authenticate user identity via email or name + zip code
Modify shipping address, payment method, or item options for pending orders
Transfer user to human agent when request cannot be handled

steps: Verify order status is 'pending' using get_order tool
Ask user for cancellation reason: must be 'no longer needed' or 'ordered by mistake'
List cancellation details including order ID and refund timeline
Get explicit user confirmation (yes) before proceeding
Call cancel_order tool with order_id and reason
Inform user: gift card refunds immediately, other methods 5-7 business days

payloads.goal: Process return or exchange for delivered orders
steps: Verify order status is 'delivered' using get_order tool
Identify which items to return or exchange
For exchange: check availability of replacement items
List return/exchange details and get explicit user confirmation
Call appropriate return_items or exchange_items tool
Inform user about refund timeline or exchange shipping

payloads.goal: Authenticate user identity at conversation start
steps: Ask user for their email address
Call get_user tool with email to locate user ID
If email not found, ask for name + zip code as alternative
Confirm user identity before proceeding with any actions

payloads.goal: Modify a pending order's address, payment, or items
steps: Verify order status is 'pending' using get_order tool
Determine what to modify: shipping address, payment method, or item options
For item modifications: collect all changes before calling modify_order (can only be called once per order)
List modification details and get explicit user confirmation
Call modify_order tool with the changes
Confirm the request cannot be handled within policy scope
Call transfer_to_human_agents tool
Send message: 'YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.'
